title: Born in Seaside, Oregon
description: A small coastal town on the Oregon coast. Population 6,000. Big dreams.

title: BS Information Systems — Oregon State University
description: Go Beavers. Graduated with a degree that would launch a 17+ year career in tech.

title: First Job: Hewlett-Packard Enterprise
description: Software Developer building government Medicaid data management systems. C#, SQL, .NET, Java. Vancouver, WA.

title: Huron Consulting Group
description: Senior Product Developer in Beaverton, OR. Built APIs, database solutions, and automated troubleshooting systems for enterprise clients. Cut average resolution time by 20%.

title: Married Heather
description: The best decision I ever made.

title: Aria is Born
description: Our first kid enters the world. Everything changes.

title: Joined Salesforce
description: Senior Outbound Technical Product Manager for Marketing Cloud. Reported to the Chief Customer Officer. This is where the Salesforce journey begins — and it never really stops.

title: Finn is Born
description: Kid number two. The crew is complete.

title: Freshworks — Staff Product Manager
description: Stepped outside the Salesforce ecosystem to lead CRM product strategy at Freshworks. Customer-first support model, data integrations, and bridging product with real-world needs.

title: Back to Salesforce Ecosystem
description: Enterprise Architect at ListEngage. Technical lead on Data Cloud, Sales Cloud, and Marketing Cloud. Solution engineering for strategic pre-sales.

title: Salesforce — Senior AI & Data Success Architect
description: Returned to Salesforce to architect Data Cloud and Agentforce implementations for enterprise customers. Certified in AI, Data Cloud, and Marketing. Training 40+ architects on the next generation of the platform.

title: Big Move to Indianapolis
description: Packed up the family and moved from the Pacific Northwest to Carmel, Indiana. New city, new chapter.
